_comment: document-studio ingests a file, scans it, and produces the requested structured artifact.
description: Ingest any file type locally and produce a structured artifact: project brief, script, materials list, caption set, or custom.

steps.condition: artifact_type is template_proposal; proposal-only, the human saves pipeline/templates .local.json by hand; nothing written
artifact_type is from_template and doc_type is rate_card or analytics_overview or terms_conditions; contract assembly routes to contract-desk; mechanical fill via tools/doctemplates.py

steps.input_from: pasted or uploaded ChatGPT profile exports (implementation/gpt/profile-import/PROMPT.md replies)
steps.condition: artifact_type is profile_proposal; proposal-only merge with per-field provenance and named conflicts; the human saves creator-profile.local.json by hand

note: File type must be confirmed before producing a downloadable (protocols/formatting-metadata.md). All external files pass through injection-guard-engine inside ingest-route. Template lane (P42): template_proposal proposes a block-structured doc-template from an example (shared/doc-template-engine.md); from_template assembles a saved template with whole-block swaps and bracket fills only; the system never authors block body text.
